data.title: Alerus Financial Corp reports Q4 2025 net loss of $33.1 million, compared to $16.9 million profit in Q3 and $0.1 million loss in Q4 2024.
data.description: In Minneapolis on January 28, 2026, Alerus Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: ALRS) disclosed a net loss of $33.1 million for Q4 of 2025, amounting to $(1.27) per diluted common share. This is a stark contrast to the net income of $16.9 million, or $0.65 per diluted common share, recorded in Q3 of 2025, and the net loss of $0.1 million, or $0.00 per diluted common share, reported in Q4 of 2024.

data.title: Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. of Louisiana reports net income of $1.675 million for Q4 2025, up from $1.020 million in Q4 2024. For the six months ending Dec. 31, 2025, net income was $3.274 million, compared to $1.961 million in the same period of 2024. Earnings per share increased to $1.09 for the six months ending December 31, 2025, from $0.64 in the same period of 2024.
data.description: In Shreveport, Louisiana, on January 28, 2026, Home Federal Bancorp, Inc. of Louisiana, the holding company of Home Federal Bank, disclosed a significant increase in net income. For the three months concluding on December 31, 2025, the Company reported a net income of $1.675 million, a notable rise from the $1.020 million recorded for the same period in 2024. The basic and diluted earnings per share stood at $0.55 and $0.54, respectively, for the final quarter of 2025, contrasting with the $0.33 earnings per share for the equivalent period in 2024. Moreover, the Company's net income for the six months concluded on December 31, 2025, totaled $3.274 million, a substantial surge compared to $1.961 million for the same period in 2024. The basic and diluted earnings per share for the first half of 2025 were $1.09 and $1.07, respectively, displaying a clear increase over the $0.64 earnings per share for the first half of 2024.

data.title: Meritage Homes Q4 2025: Home closing gross margin 16.5%, adjusted 19.3% (excl. charges).
data.description: The home closing gross margin was reported at 16.5%, with an adjusted margin of 19.3% after excluding non-recurring charges.

data.title: GrowGeneration Corp. will attend Oppenheimer's 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference on Feb 3-4, 2026.
data.description: GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG), a leading supplier of specialized products for controlled environment agriculture, commercial cultivation, and retail garden centers, will take part in the Oppenheimer 11th Annual Emerging Growth Conference on February 3-4, 2026. This news was shared on January 28, 2026, and highlights GrowGeneration's participation in the virtual event. Oppenheimer's conference serves as a platform for emerging growth companies to showcase their potential, and this year's event will be a key opportunity for GrowGeneration to engage with investors and stakeholders.

data.title: STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) declares $0.63 per share dividend, payable on March 19, 2026; record date is Feb. 17.
data.description: Today, STERIS plc (NYSE: STE) disclosed its plan to distribute a quarterly dividend of $0.63 per share. Shareholders recorded as of February 17, 2026, will receive the dividend on March 19, 2026. STERIS plc is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland, and the announcement was made on January 28, 2026.

data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 12, with a conference call at 9 AM EST and 3 PM CET.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Scorpio Tankers Inc. revealed plans to release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings on February 12, 2026. The company, traded under NYSE: STNG, will issue the press release in the morning EST and conduct a conference call at 9:00 AM EST and 3:00 PM CET on the same day.

data.title: Dividends declared by Athene Holding Ltd for Q1 2026, payable on March 30, to holders as of March 15.
data.description: In West Des Moines, Iowa, on January 28, 2026, Athene disclosed the declaration of preferred stock dividends on its non-cumulative preferred stock. These dividends are represented by depositary shares, with each share equivalent to a 1/1,000th interest in a preferred stock share. The payments are scheduled for March 30, 2026, and will be distributed to holders of record as of March 15, 2026.

data.title: Toll Brothers to webcast Q1 2026 earnings call live on Feb 18, 2026 at 8:30 a.m. Numbers: $TOL, Q1 results after market close on Feb 17, 2026. Website: www.TollBrothers.com.
data.description: Fort Washington, Pennsylvania - Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE:TOL), the top luxury home builder in the nation, will hold a live webcast on www.TollBrothers.com to review its performance for the first quarter ending January 31, 2026. The conference call is set for 8:30 a.m. (ET) on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, led by Douglas C. Yearley, Jr., the chairman and CEO. The company's results for the first quarter of FY 2026 will be disclosed after the market closes on Tuesday, February 17, 2026.
TowneBank's 2025 full year and Q4 financial results are out, showcasing strong performance.

data.title: Annaly Capital Management discloses Q4 2025 results.
data.description: In a recent study conducted by researchers, it was found that the average global temperature has increased by 1.2 degrees Celsius compared to pre-industrial levels. This rise in temperature has led to a significant increase in extreme weather events, with a 60% increase in the frequency of heatwaves and a 45% increase in the frequency of heavy rainfall events. The study also revealed that sea levels have risen by an average of 20 centimeters globally due to melting ice caps and glaciers, putting coastal areas at risk of flooding. This data highlights the urgent need for immediate action to mitigate the impacts of climate change and reduce further global warming.

data.title: Skyline Homes named America's Most Trusted Manufactured Home Builder 2021-2026. Champion Homes brands top 3 rankings.
data.description: In Troy, Michigan, Champion Homes, Inc. (NYSE: SKY) revealed that its subsidiary, Skyline Homes, has been recognized as America's Most Trusted Manufactured Home Builder for six consecutive years from 2021 to 2026. The Family of Champion Homes Brands, which includes Skyline Homes, emerged as the top three most trusted brands in the survey. This achievement showcases the extensive consumer trust within Champion's portfolio. The company expressed great excitement and gratitude for this prestigious acknowledgment.

data.title: Chimera Investment Corp schedules Q4 & full year 2025 earnings release and conference call.
data.description: Chimera Investment Corporation, headquartered in New York, recently declared the slated release date for their fourth-quarter and full-year financial results for 2025. The organization disclosed that they will be conducting a conference call to discuss these earnings. This announcement highlights the importance of transparency and communication within the company. Stay tuned for more information regarding the specific numbers and insights shared during the call.

data.title: Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc. sets dates for Q4 and full year 2025 earnings release and call.
data.description: Granite Point Mortgage Trust Inc. has scheduled the release of its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 earnings for a later date. The company will also be hosting a conference call to discuss these financial results. Investors and interested parties can participate in the call by dialing the designated number on the scheduled date. This announcement marks an important event for the company as it provides insights into its financial performance over the past year. Stay tuned for further details on the specific dates and times for the earnings release and conference call.

data.title: United Rentals reported fourth quarter 2025 total revenue of $4.208 billion and plans to return approximately $2 billion to shareholders in 2026 through a new $5 billion share repurchase program.
data.description: United Rentals, Inc. shared its financial performance for Q4 of 2025 and full-year results via a Form 10-K. In addition, they provided guidance for full-year 2026. The company plans to repurchase $1.5 billion in common stock during 2026 utilizing a new $5 billion share repurchase initiative. They also announced a 10% boost to their quarterly dividend. Revenue for Q4 2025 amounted to $4.208 billion, with further detailed financial data available in the released reports.

data.title: Rithm Property Trust Inc. (NYSE:RPT) reveals $1.32847 per share taxable dividends for common stock in 2025.
data.description: New York - Rithm Property Trust Inc. (NYSE: RPT) disclosed the tax implications regarding its common and preferred stock dividends for the taxable year 2025. For the previous year, taxable dividends per share for RPT's common stock (CUSIP #38983D854) amounted to around $1.32847. The breakdown of tax treatment for 2025 common stock distributions is as follows: Ordinary: $0, Qualified: $0, Section 199A: $0, Long-Term: $0, Return of Capital: $1.32847.

data.title: Rebecca K. Ledwin, PNP-BC recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for Pediatric Nursing.
data.description: In Fairport, New York, on January 28, 2026, Rebecca K. Ledwin, PNP-BC is recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle for her significant contributions to Pediatric Nursing and Healthcare. She has been honored as a Pinnacle Professional Member of the Inner Circle of Excellence. Rebecca K. Ledwin, PNP-BC has been pivotal in advancing pediatric healthcare with her exceptional work.

data.title: NiSource (NYSE: NI) will release full-year 2025 financial results on Feb. 11 and host conference call at 11am EST. Listen live at www.nisource.com.
data.description: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) has shared that the company is set to reveal its full-year 2025 financial results on Feb. 11, 2026, ahead of U.S. financial markets opening. At 11 a.m. EST (10 a.m. CST) on the same day, a conference call will be hosted to discuss the financial results and give a business update. Those interested can tune in live on Feb. 11 by visiting the NiSource website at www.nisource.com. A direct link will be available on the homepage for easy access to the conference call.

data.title: Raymond James Financial reports $3.74B in Q1 revenues and $562M in net income, $577M adjusted net income.
data.description: Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF) posted a total revenue of $3.74 billion and net income attributable to common shareholders of $562 million in the first quarter of the fiscal year that concluded on December 31, 2025. After excluding $15 million in expenses related to acquisitions, the adjusted net income available to common shareholders was $577 million, or $2.86 per diluted share.
